item.raidsenhanced.golem_of_last_resort_: Golem of Last Resort Spawn Egg
raidsenhanced.item_description.blimp_par: Craft with any boat to convert it into a blimp
raidsenhanced.item_description.handcanno: Use to fire a powerful bomb
raidsenhanced.item_description.player_bl: Place on ground to summon your own blimp
raidsenhanced.item_description.zapper_st: Use to release a ball lightning. If used while looking on ground casts lightnings around the user.
raidsenhanced.mount: Interact with the blimp again to Dismount.
